DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Todd E. Chvat (949-477-5050) of Wright Finlay & Zak for American Home Mortgage, defendant and moving party, via CourtCall/ Zachary Toran (415-850-9067) of Law Offices of Zachary Toran for Leopoldo Cap, plaintiff and opposing party

Hearing - Court tentatively rules as follows: DEFENDANTs AMERICAN HOME MORTGAGE SERVICING, INC., and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is
overruled as to 2923.5, noving party has no binding authority; Second cause of action UCL, sustain with leave to amend. Plaintiff to allege injury cause by defendant's wrong doing; as to the third and fourth causes of action, sustain with leave to amend to allege 1) what facts support statute of limitations tolled; and 2) address assignee liability under Franklin.
Defendant submits to the tentative, plaintiff argues. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling. Plaintiff has ten days to amend from filing notice of entry of order. Moving party to submit order in conformity with the tentative. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
